title: Demystifying A2UI: How to Make AI Agents “Speak UI” in Your App
description: Explore A2UI, a groundbreaking approach enabling AI agents to understand and interact directly with your application's user interface. This article demystifies the core concepts, explains how AI agents can 'speak UI' to perform actions, generate insights, and enhance user experience, and provides practical steps for integration into your projects.
author: Satish
